name: Ubiquiti UISP Power TransPort Cable 0.5m
title: Ubiquiti UISP Power TransPort Cable 0.5m
short_description: Power TransPort cable, TPE jacket (VW-1), 12 AWG, 0.5m
description: Power TransPort cable, TPE jacket (VW-1), 12 AWG, 0.5m

detailed_description.heading: Design and Compatibility
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UACC-Cable-PT-0.5M UISP Power TransPort Cable is specifically engineered for robust outdoor installations, offering superior performance in all-weather conditions. This 0.5-meter cable is an integral component of Ubiquiti's Unified ISP (UISP) ecosystem within a flawlessly integration with such devices like UISP-P-Pro ; UISP-P;  UISP-Console; UISP-S-Plus; UISP-S-Pro; UISP-R-Pro and UACC-Cable-PT-Ext

detailed_description.heading: Material and Durability
detailed_description.text: The cable is constructed with a fire-resistant thermoplastic elastomer (TPE) jacket that meets the VW-1 flame rating, ensuring additional safety against potential fire hazards. The jacket is UV-resistant, preventing degradation from ultraviolet light exposure, which is critical for maintaining integrity in outdoor settings. With a diameter of 11 x 6.5 mm, the cable's robust build is designed to handle the physical demands of outdoor environments. The TPE jacket material is chosen for its elastic and durable properties, which are essential for outdoor cable installations.

detailed_description.heading: Connectivity and Performance
detailed_description.text: The cable features a Power TransPort connector on the both sides, optimized for a seamless connection with UISP devices having TransPort interface aviability. It supports high-speed data transfer and efficient power delivery, ensuring optimal performance for network operations. The use of 12 AWG tin stranded copper conductors provides excellent electrical conductivity and flexibility, enhancing both the efficiency and durability of the cable.

detailed_description.heading: Applications and Environment
detailed_description.text: Designed for all-weather endurance, the cable can operate in extreme temperatures ranging from -40 to 80° C (-40 to 176° F). Its construction materials and design ensure that it remains functional and reliable under harsh weather conditions, making it suitable for a wide range of climates. It is particularly useful in expansive network installations such as those found in campuses, enterprise environments, or large-scale industrial areas where reliable and durable cable solutions are necessary.
